title: Rack row power headroom assessment
difficulty_justification: Requires reading rack inventory power loads and computing remaining capacity against the facility power budget — numerical cross-referencing across two sources.
query_text: How much power headroom remains in each rack and across the facility as a whole, given the current hardware inventory?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Total rack power: R-01 (6.4 kW) + R-02 (6.4 kW) + R-03 (24.0 kW) + R-04 (24.0 kW) + R-05 (19.2 kW) = 80.0 kW. Facility power budget: 200 kW. Headroom: 120.0 kW (60% remaining). Per-rack headroom: R-01/R-02 have 2 empty U slots each (low-density), R-03/R-04 are fully populated (0 empty U, gpu_v100), R-05 has 4 empty U slots (highmem). The facility has significant total headroom but Row C (GPU racks) are at capacity in terms of rack space.

checkpoints.description: Agent sums rack power loads to 80 kW.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer contains 80 kW total IT load
